title: Yello Metal Crab Bucket, Beach Bucket Fishing Accessory, 6L, BU1308
features: LARGE CRAB BUCKET: 6L metal bucket perfect for kids to admire crabs and small fish
GREAT OUTDOORS: easy to carry to the beach to catch crabs and other small fish for endless summer fun
PERFECT SIZE: for seawater and to place crabs and small fish in
ZERO PLASTIC: made from galvanised steel crab bucket and sustainable wooden handle
GREAT FISHING ACCESSORY: dimensions L 24.5cm x H 23.5cm X W 24.5cm
description: This eco-friendly plastic-free 6Ltr Metal Crab Bucket is perfect for when your little ones are crabbing off a pier or exploring wildlife in beach rock pools so they can admire their catch. With a generous 6 litre capacity, the Yello 6Ltr Metal Crab Bucket has plenty of room for crabs or small fish to be kept in fresh seawater. The strong and durable galvanised steel bucket has a fun crab print and includes a sustainable wooden handle making it easy to carry to the beach or from rock pool to rock pool. The zero-plastic crab bucket is an essential seaside fishing accessory for children of all ages.
